name: Abhishek Raj
role: GRC & Cybersecurity Student | Aspiring Governance, Risk & Compliance Professional
summary: I am a B.Tech Cybersecurity student with a strong interest in Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC). My foundation in a disciplined, leadership-oriented environment shaped the way I approach cybersecurity—not just as a technical field, but as a responsibility to align security with organizational objectives. I enjoy analyzing systems, understanding how processes work behind the scenes, and translating complex security concepts into structured, business-focused solutions.
mission: To build a career in Governance, Risk & Compliance by helping organizations strengthen their security posture through effective risk management, compliance, and continuous improvement while growing into a trusted cybersecurity leader.
strengths: Quick learner with a structured approach
differentiators: Leadership skills developed through a disciplined defence-school environment.
Enjoys asking the right questions, understanding business processes, and identifying potential risks before they become issues.
Combines technical cybersecurity knowledge with a strong interest in governance, compliance, and business communication.
